_note: The `let el: T | null = $state(null)` declaration gets an in-line `<T>` generic injected into the overlay, shifting every later byte on that line. Diagnostics to the right of the injection (the TS2322 on `bad`) must still map to the pre-shift source column: the script-body splice records longest-common-prefix/suffix token-map entries against the source slice, so byte-identical regions around an in-line rewrite keep exact column mapping instead of falling back to the line map's column passthrough.
